---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents: projects.yml
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
---

## Applied Consultancy Project *(MSc Dissertation)*
**Dublin City University | 2025–2026**

### Overview
Led an end-to-end data analytics consultancy engagement for an SME, focused on 
optimising product buying and inventory management through machine learning and 
data visualisation.

### My Role
Served as **project lead and primary point of contact**, coordinating team collaboration 
and managing client communication throughout the project lifecycle.

### What I Built
- **Demand forecasting models** — Implemented machine learning models to predict 
product demand and streamline supply chain operations
- **Interactive dashboards** — Developed visualisations to translate complex datasets 
into clear, actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders

### Skills Used
`Python` `Machine Learning` `Data Visualisation` `SQL` `Stakeholder Communication`

---

## More Projects
A research proposal - the causal effect that physical activity can have on improved mental health as part of prescribed treatment.
